attributes.action: Introduce a fair price cap on household heating oil
attributes.additional_details: Introduce a fair and transparent price cap on domestic heating oil, similar to that for gas and electricity. This cap should apply to all households, ensuring consistent protection from excessive pricing and volatility for those who rely on heating oil.
attributes.background: We want the Government to introduce regulation of the domestic heating oil market by implementing a fair and transparent price cap, similar to that applied to mains gas and electricity, and ensure it applies to all households using heating oil.

rejection.details: Regulate companies supplying heating oil and LPG: https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/764213
